title: WayMoreOres
description: A mod that adds way more ores to Minecraft!
body:
# WayMoreOres

Here is a list of some of the ores present in the mod:

- Uranium
- Aluminum
- Lead
- Lithium
- Platinum
- Ruby
- Sapphire
- Enderite

This is not the full list of ores that are in the mod. There are also way more ores coming up in future updates!

### As of right now, this mod is fabric only. Existing forge versions have been discontinued and future forge versions are not planned. If you want to make a forge port of this mod, the source code is on github.
